categories.name: Vases
categories.description: Sculptural vessels in marble, glass, brass, and stoneware.

categories.name: Lamps

categories.name: Mirrors
categories.description: Arched, round, and floor mirrors with brass and stone trim.

categories.name: Candles & Diffusers
categories.description: Oud, fig, rose, sandalwood — slow-burn rituals for home.

categories.name: Table Accessories
categories.description: Napkins, candlesticks, coasters and serving pieces.

products.name: Marble Carrara Vase
products.description:
Marble Carrara Vase is part of the THIS Interiors core collection — a quietly considered piece for spaces that favour material over decoration. Crafted in carrara marble, the form is restrained and the finish is hand-worked.

Designed for everyday rituals: weighty in the hand, generous in proportion, easy to live with. The ivory tone reads warm in daylight and recedes by lamplight, sitting comfortably alongside linen, oak, brass and stone.

Each piece is finished by hand, so subtle variation is part of the character. Care is straightforward: a soft, dry cloth is enough for most surfaces — avoid harsh detergents and direct sun.

Shipped from our Dubai studio in protective packaging. Pieces ship within 2–4 working days inside the UAE; international orders take 7–14 working days.

reviews.title: A small ritual
reviews.body: Bought one for us and one as a gift. Both have been admired. The finish is genuinely hand-worked.

reviews.title: A small ritual
reviews.body: Lovely object. The base is felted so it doesn't scratch the marble.

reviews.title: Pairs beautifully with linen
reviews.body: Slight variation on the rim which I love — feels handmade, not factory.

reviews.title: Subtle and considered
reviews.body: Slight variation on the rim which I love — feels handmade, not factory.

general.address: Al Quoz Industrial 1, Warehouse 14, Dubai, United Arab Emirates

homepage.heroSubtitle: A small Dubai studio working in marble, brass, linen and stone — pieces designed to settle in and stay.

announcement.text: Complimentary gift wrap on orders over AED 800.

payment.bankDetails: THIS Interiors LLC · Emirates NBD · IBAN AE000000000000000000000 · BIC EBILAEAD

emails.orderConfirmation: Thank you for your order. We are preparing it now and will share tracking once it ships.
emails.shipping: Your order is on its way — please allow 2–4 working days inside the UAE.
emails.passwordReset: Use the link below within 30 minutes to reset your password.
emails.welcome: Welcome to THIS Interiors. We are glad you are here.
